name: Walnut Pie a La Mode
recipeInstructions:
--------------
Walnut Pie:
-----------
3 cups Flour 1 Large Egg yolk
1 cup Sugar 1 lb Walnuts, chopped
1 cup Butter, cooled 2 Cups Heavy Cream
1 teaspoon Salt 2 Cups Sugar
1 Large Egg
Vanilla Ice Cream:
-------------------
Cut the vanilla bean into 4 sections and place it in a saucepan with milk. Bring to a boil and remove from heat.
In a stainless bowl, whisk egg yolks and sugar until foamy. Strain the hot milk into the egg mixture.
Place the bowl over a double boiler and mix until thickened and coats the spatula.
Remove the bowl and stir in heavy cream. Refrigerate until cold.
Churn the ice cream for 30 minutes or until stiff.
Assembly:
---------
In a large bowl, combine sugar, butter, and salt. Add flour 1 cup at a time and mix.
Add egg yolk and mix well but do not overwork.
Divide into two portions (2/3 and 1/3). Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, overnight if possible.
Roll out the 2/3 portion to 13 inches. Place in a buttered pie plate. Refrigerate.
Roll out the remaining dough to 11 inches. Refrigerate on wax paper.
Walnut Filling:
---------------
In a saucepan over medium heat, boil heavy cream and sugar until reduced by half. Add walnuts and cook for 5 minutes.
Refrigerate the mixture.
Fill the pie with the walnut filling. Brush the edge of the dough with beaten egg yolk. Cover with remaining dough, pressing edges, and trim excess.
Score the dough in a crisscross pattern. Bake at 375°F until set (30 minutes).
Serve chilled with vanilla ice cream.
